data.title: Update completion-verifier.md: add PRECONDITIONS reading step for closure checks
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Story
0263-62ba — Migrate 4 consumers to PRECONDITIONS, add compaction on epic-closure with ordering contract

## Objective
Add a PRECONDITIONS reading step to `completion-verifier.md` so the completion-verifier agent reads upstream PRECONDITIONS events as additional context for its story/epic closure checks. The step must align with the compaction ordering contract (validator before compaction).

## Files to Modify
- `plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md`

## Implementation Notes
Add a new step (e.g., "Step 1.5: Load PRECONDITIONS Context") to the Procedure section:

```
### Step 1.5: Load PRECONDITIONS Context

Before evaluating success criteria, load PRECONDITIONS events for the ticket being verified:

```bash
# Read latest PRECONDITIONS for the ticket (graceful-degrade on missing events)
_read_latest_preconditions <ticket_id> 2>/dev/null || echo '{"status": "pre-manifest"}'
```

- Use `_read_latest_preconditions` (from `ticket-lib.sh`) to fetch the most recent PRECONDITIONS manifest
- If the ticket has zero PRECONDITIONS events, proceed with `{"status": "pre-manifest"}` — do not block or error
- Use the `gate_verdicts` field to cross-check which gates were confirmed by upstream validators
- Use the `workflow_completion_checklist` field (if present at standard/deep tier) as additional evidence for SC verification
- IMPORTANT: This step reads PRECONDITIONS only. Do NOT write or compact PRECONDITIONS — that is handled by the epic-closure validator after this verifier completes (see ordering contract in story 0263-62ba).
```

## Ordering contract note
The completion-verifier is a READER of PRECONDITIONS. The epic-closure validator (Story 4, ticket 92a6-52d6) is the WRITER. The compaction (Story 5, this story) runs AFTER the validator. This step must not trigger compaction — read-only access only.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `completion-verifier.md` contains a section with "PRECONDITIONS" in a step heading or step procedure
  Verify: grep -q "PRECONDITIONS" plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] The section references `_read_latest_preconditions` or describes reading PRECONDITIONS events
  Verify: grep -q "_read_latest_preconditions\|PRECONDITIONS events" plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] The section includes graceful-degrade language (zero events → proceed without blocking)
  Verify: grep -qiE "pre-manifest|zero.*events|no.*events|graceful" plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] Structural test passes (T9)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-completion-verifier-preconditions.sh test_completion_verifier_has_preconditions_section
- [ ] No existing completion-verifier tests regress
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-completion-verifier-story-trust.sh 2>&1 | grep "^FAIL" | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
